kf_prompt: 3D Pixar-style cartoon animation, dramatic moody lighting. A cute but STERN anthropomorphic cartoon GLUCOMETER character: a handheld blood-glucose meter standing upright, its small rectangular SCREEN is its face showing two expressive angry eyes and a glowing red number, with tiny stubby arms. It stands on a wooden nightstand half-emerging from an open drawer, pointing one little arm accusingly toward the viewer. Dark bedroom at night, cold blue with a warm amber accent, a tense worried mood. Vertical 9:16, the glucometer centered, lower third kept clear.
anim_prompt: The glucometer character leans forward and points accusingly at the viewer, its screen-face eyes narrowing and its display flickering as it scolds.
